hero.title: AI Voice Agents for Lead Qualification & Booking
hero.description: AI voice agents that call prospects, qualify leads, and book appointments — at scale, without a sales team.

outbound_leads.title: Outbound Lead Qualification
outbound_leads.description: Call and qualify hundreds of leads per day. AI handles the first conversation so your sales team only talks to qualified prospects.

appointment_setting.title: Appointment Setting
appointment_setting.description: Fill calendars automatically. The voice agent books meetings directly into your calendar system.

inbound_service.title: Inbound Customer Service
inbound_service.description: Handle routine calls 24/7. Answer FAQs, route complex issues, and never put a customer on hold.

post_sale.title: Post-Sale Follow-up
post_sale.description: Automated check-ins, renewal reminders, and satisfaction surveys — at scale.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Transparent pricing for voice AI solutions

partnership.title: Built With Specialized Partners
partnership.description: Our voice agent solutions are built in collaboration with specialized voice AI partners, ensuring you get the best technology and expertise available in the market.

voice_quality.q: How natural does the AI voice sound?
voice_quality.a: Modern voice AI is remarkably natural. We use the latest text-to-speech models that sound indistinguishable from human voices in most conversations.

objections.q: Can the voice agent handle objections?
objections.a: Yes. We train the agent on your specific objection-handling scripts. It can navigate common pushbacks and knows when to escalate to a human.

languages.a: English, Spanish, French, German, Dutch, and many more. Multi-language support is available on Standard and above.

crm.q: How does it integrate with my CRM?
crm.a: We integrate with HubSpot, Salesforce, Pipedrive, and any CRM with an API. Call outcomes, transcripts, and lead scores are automatically synced.

final_cta.title: Book a Voice Agent Demo
final_cta.description: Hear a live demo of our voice AI and discover how it can qualify leads and book meetings for your business.
